description.value:
You're an ambassador to communities, whether on Castrovel or beyond. You were trained in the tradition of the ancient formian ambassadors whose great and tremendous effort unified the Colonies.

As an ambassador formian, you become trained in Society. If you would automatically become trained in Society (such as from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in another skill of your choice. Additionally, if you roll a success on a Perception check to [[/act sense-motive]], you get a critical success instead.
